title: Snappy Light Korean Seeds Dosirak
description: A resinous and snappy Korean dish featuring seeds, served in an earthenware bowl, perfect for a light lunch
instructions: Toast the sesame seeds in a dry pan over medium heat until fragrant
Roast the pumpkin seeds in a 350 degree oven for 10 minutes
In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, rice vinegar, and honey
In a large earthenware bowl, combine the toasted sesame seeds, roasted pumpkin seeds, and minced garlic
Add the grated ginger to the bowl and stir to combine
Pour the soy sauce mixture over the seed mixture and stir to coat
Add the water to the bowl and stir to combine
Simmer the mixture over low heat for 10 minutes
Serve the Snappy Light Korean Seeds Dosirak hot in the earthenware bowl
